## Summary

What does this PR change and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs / copy / SEO
- [ ] Refactor (no behavior change)
- [ ] CI / deploy / tooling
- [ ] Tests only

## How tested

- [ ] `ruff check .`
- [ ] `python -m pytest` (or relevant subset)
- [ ] Manual check (describe):
- [ ] N/A

## Checklist

- [ ] No secrets, cookies, or credentials in the PR
- [ ] No real Udemy login/enroll tests against production
- [ ] No CAPTCHA/stealth/rate-limit evasion additions without maintainer discussion
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (`README`, `CHANGELOG` Unreleased, privacy/copy if needed)
- [ ] Focused diff (no unrelated reformat)

## Risk / rollback

Any migration, deploy, or breaking API notes?
